protocol.rssPolicy: observed-only: allocator/shared resident-page noise makes short-window RSS return unsuitable as a hard invariant

memoryRuntime.rssFallbackReason: process.getProcessMemoryInfo returned no finite residentSet in the installed renderer; using the measured process.memoryUsage().rss value.

environment.coldDefinition: First 50-slide representative open after installed Obsidian launch; excluded from gates.
environment.warmDefinition: Same-process 50-slide opens after closing the prior leaf; two warmups excluded, ten measured.
